name: Mane 7 [vs YOU!]
description:
"7 vs 1 isn't unfair, we're just using the 'friendship' perk."

Get ready to get wiped out by the cute pastel ponies! It's (you) VS the mane six AND Starlight Glimmer! It's a villain user bot, so you're a villain who decided that a good use of their time was to break into Twilight's library and make a scene.

There's been a few Mane Six vs (YOU) bots, but none of them with Glim Glam, so I made one. They're also meant to be more in character here, hence the absurd token count.

So, to save tokens, the initial message and scenario are simple and lazy. This was 100% intentional though because now it's more open ended and you can be anything!
creator: The Ruiner
